title: 酒店退房投诉英语5句🔥别再说I don’t like it！

cover.style_keywords: 简约高级、蓝白旅感、手写体英文、酒店前台插画风

slides.wrong_cn: This air conditioner is very bad!
slides.wrong_en: This air conditioner is very bad!
slides.correct_en: The AC wasn’t cooling at all — could we get this checked before I check out?
slides.correct_cn: 空调完全不制冷——退房前能麻烦检查一下吗？

dialogue.a: A: Hi, the AC in Room 308 wasn’t cooling at all — could we get this checked before I check out?
dialogue.a_cn: 你好，308房间空调完全不制冷，退房前能麻烦检查一下吗？
dialogue.b: B: Oh, I’m so sorry! Let me call maintenance right away and offer you a discount.
dialogue.b_cn: 啊太抱歉了！我马上叫维修，再给您减免部分房费。

slides.tip: 用‘wasn’t + 动词-ing’代替‘is bad’，把问题归因于状态而非人，既客观又留台阶

slides.wrong_cn: Your sheet is dirty! Change it now!
slides.wrong_en: Your sheet is dirty! Change it now!
slides.correct_en: I noticed some stains on the sheets — would it be possible to have them replaced or a room change?
slides.correct_cn: 我发现床单上有污渍——方便更换床单，或换一间房吗？

dialogue.a: A: I noticed some stains on the sheets — would it be possible to have them replaced or a room change?
dialogue.a_cn: 我发现床单上有污渍——方便更换床单，或换一间房吗？
dialogue.b: B: Absolutely — let me arrange a fresh set and upgrade you to a suite as an apology.
dialogue.b_cn: 当然可以——我马上安排新床单，并免费为您升级套房致歉。

slides.tip: ‘I noticed…’ 是万能软化开头，比‘You have…’少指责感，+ ‘would it be possible…’ 把要求变成共同解题

slides.wrong_cn: The bathroom is leaking! You must fix it!
slides.wrong_en: The bathroom is leaking! You must fix it!
slides.correct_en: There’s water leaking from the shower drain — could someone take a quick look? It’s been dripping nonstop.
slides.correct_cn: 淋浴地漏一直在漏水——方便请人快速看一下吗？已经滴个不停了。

dialogue.a: A: There’s water leaking from the shower drain — could someone take a quick look? It’s been dripping nonstop.
dialogue.a_cn: 淋浴地漏一直在漏水——方便请人快速看一下吗？已经滴个不停了。
dialogue.b: B: Yes, our engineer is on standby — I’ll escort you to the front desk for a complimentary breakfast voucher while they fix it.
dialogue.b_cn: 好的，我们的工程师随时待命——我带您去前台领一份免费早餐券，维修马上开始。

slides.tip: 描述具体位置（shower drain）+ 持续状态（has been dripping）= 让问题真实可感，避免模糊指控

slides.wrong_cn: Your Wi-Fi is terrible! I can’t use internet!
slides.wrong_en: Your Wi-Fi is terrible! I can’t use internet!
slides.correct_en: I’ve tried connecting several times but keep getting disconnected — is there a stronger signal option or a wired port available?
slides.correct_cn: 我试了好几次，但一直断连——有更强信号的网络，或网线接口可用吗？

dialogue.a: A: I’ve tried connecting several times but keep getting disconnected — is there a stronger signal option or a wired port available?
dialogue.a_cn: 我试了好几次，但一直断连——有更强信号的网络，或网线接口可用吗？
dialogue.b: B: Apologies — let me reset the router and give you a priority access code. Also, here’s a USB-C Ethernet adapter on the house.
dialogue.b_cn: 非常抱歉——我马上重置路由器，并给您一个优先接入码。另附赠一个USB-C网线转换器。

slides.tip: 用‘I’ve tried… but…’展示你已努力，把‘你们不行’悄悄转成‘我们一起优化’

slides.scene_title: 最后通牒式诉求（礼貌版）
slides.wrong_cn: If you don’t fix it, I will complain to manager!
slides.wrong_en: If you don’t fix it, I will complain to manager!
slides.correct_en: To wrap things up smoothly, could we agree on a solution by [time] — say, a partial refund or a confirmed upgrade for my next stay?
slides.correct_cn: 为了顺利结账，我们能否在[时间]前确认一个方案？比如部分退款，或下次入住时确认升级？

dialogue.a: A: To wrap things up smoothly, could we agree on a solution by 11am — say, a partial refund or a confirmed upgrade for my next stay?
dialogue.a_cn: 为了顺利结账，我们能否在上午11点前确认一个方案？比如部分退款，或下次入住时确认升级？
dialogue.b: B: Done — refund processed, and your suite booking for next month is locked in. Thank you for your patience!
dialogue.b_cn: 已处理——退款到账，下月套房预订也已锁定！感谢您的理解！

slides.tip: ‘To wrap things up smoothly’ 是高级缓冲句，把施压包装成合作，还暗含时间锚点+二选一选项，推动立刻决策

caption:
酒店前台微笑点头说‘No problem’，却转身就走？你缺的不是勇气，是这5句让对方立刻行动的英语！✅不吼不怼，不卑不亢，母语者听了都觉得‘这客人好懂规矩’～出国住酒店再也不当沉默小鹌鹑！👇评论区告诉我：你最想吐槽哪家酒店的哪件事？我来帮你翻译成‘优雅暴击版’英语！✨收藏这篇，下次退房前扫一眼，气场两米八！

#旅行英语 #酒店英语 #实用口语 #出国必备 #英语表达 #小红书英语课 #地道英语
